_metadata.description: The exact structure of the encrypted E2E payload sent through the Bus Station.

field_dictionary.sender_public_key: String - Base64 encoded P-256 public key of the sender.
field_dictionary.ciphertext: String - Base64 encoded AES-256-GCM encrypted payload.
field_dictionary.remote_id: UUID (Optional) - Supabase lockboxes row ID for ACK deletion.
field_dictionary.sender_device_id: UUID (Optional) - Anonymous sender device shipping label.
field_dictionary.timestamp: ISO 8601 Date - When the payload was generated.
